services.label: // SERVICES
services.title: Landings, ecommerce & software — built around you
services.lead: Not just landing pages. I design and build digital presence, Shopify-connected stores, and platforms with frontend, backend, and database — clear, fast, and aligned to your profession, product, or business.
services.visualCaption: From landing pages to full products

pillars.title: Landing pages
pillars.body: Purpose-built pages for any profession or business: a clear message, fast load times, and a simple path to contact or sale — no generic templates.

pillars.title: Shopify ecommerce
pillars.body: Stores connected to Shopify: catalog, checkout, and a shopping experience that matches your brand. Built to sell for real, not just look good.

pillars.title: Software & platforms
pillars.body: Custom products with frontend, backend, and database — real flows, panels, and business logic, not just a pretty page.

services.audienceTitle: Any profession or product. One standard: quality.
services.audienceLead: I work with people, brands, and teams that need anything from clear digital presence to an ecommerce store or a full platform.

faqs.q: Do you work in Medellín and Barranquilla?
faqs.a: Yes. Those are my main areas, and I also take remote projects across Colombia.

faqs.q: Do you only build landing pages?
faqs.a: No. I also build Shopify-connected ecommerce and custom software or platforms (frontend, backend, and database), depending on what your business or product needs.

faqs.q: Does it work for my profession even if it's not tech?
faqs.a: Yes. The approach is the same: understand what you offer, who you're talking to, and build the right digital piece — landing, store, or platform — with clarity and personality.

faqs.q: Is this custom design or a template?
faqs.a: Custom. I start from your brand and business goal — no recycled themes with a logo stuck on top.
It depends on scope (landing, store, or platform), but I aim for short cycles: define, design, iterate, and publish without dragging it forever.
